title: DaFlight Fabric
description: Precise, customizable flight with no sliding, made for creative builders.
body:
This is a modern Fabric port of DaFlight for LiteLoader, which itself is based roughly on Zombe's Flymod.

Highly Recommend:
Keybind Fix (or similar, like Amecs) to allow duplicate conflicting hotkeys

Requires Cloth Config, Fabric Language Kotlin, and Fabric API.

Why not just use creative flight?

- No sliding, deceleration, acceleration, or momentum. This allows you to be much more precise with your position. 
- Fly speed is customizable, and doesn't require any server-side functionality besides needing creative flight
- "Fly boost" works like sprinting, but in any direction including vertically, and has a configurable speed modifier. (No more waiting 5 minutes to reach the top of your megabuild)

- There is also an additional option for 3d flight (fly toward the direction you're looking) 

How to use:
 - Configure your desired keybinds and presets
- Enable creative flight
- Enable DaFlight's flight mode
- Fly using your custom set keys
